overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown during golden hour. The journey progresses from a shaded highway underpass through sunlit commercial streets lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, transitioning finally into a dark narrow alleyway with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with tram tracks and graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars dominating the upper frame
gray concrete ground with geometric tile patterns and scattered debris
metal rail tracks embedded in the road surface running parallel to the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
tall black metal lamp post with modern fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a shaded urban environment. The concrete plaza features tram tracks to the right and graffiti-covered walls to the left, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban intersection with palm trees and glass towers

events.description: exits the shaded highway underpass into bright golden hour sunlight
pauses at crosswalk waiting for black sedan and other vehicles to pass

agents.ego_description: navigating across the sunlit intersection among a crowd of pedestrians while avoiding vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street, backlit by the setting sun
modern glass and steel high-rise building reflecting the golden sunlight
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadows into brilliant golden hour sunlight at a busy intersection. Palm trees and modern glass towers line the street as the character crosses the road among a dense crowd, waiting for a black sedan to pass before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with massive digital advertisements

events.description: turns right to follow the main commercial street with heavy foot traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the bustling sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the massive digital billboards overhead

notable_agents.action: person in bright blue jacket walking alongside the camera
futuristic black car driving along the street

entered.detail: massive building-sized LED screen displaying animated advertisements
multi-story building with glass windows and ground-level shops
orange metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a vibrant commercial street lined with massive digital billboards and futuristic architecture. The sidewalk is crowded with pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the road as the warm sunlight illuminates the glass facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with prominent neon advertising and storefronts

events.description: enters shaded area under building overhang with prominent pink neon signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under building overhangs, passing groups of pedestrians near storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near the pink billboard

entered.detail: large vertical pink neon advertisement with 'WIDE OPEN' text visible
enclosed walkway connecting buildings above the street level
glass door entrance to commercial establishment with neon lighting
brown metal barrier along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a shaded area under building overhangs where artificial neon lighting mixes with the remaining natural light. A prominent pink billboard dominates the left side while pedestrians gather near storefront entrances, and traffic continues to flow along the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with steam vents and green neon lighting

events.description: turns left into narrow alleyway with steam vents and green neon lighting replacing the open street

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow alleyway with steam rising from vents, following a distant figure through the green-lit passage

notable_agents.action: lone figure walking ahead in the alley, partially obscured by steam

entered.detail: illuminated green signage casting colored light on the alley walls
ground-level vent emitting white steam or vapor into the alley
tall concrete wall with graffiti and utility fixtures
traditional red paper-style lantern hanging near the alley entrance

segments.scene_description: Turning into a narrow enclosed alleyway where green neon lighting and rising steam create a moody atmosphere. The space is flanked by high concrete walls with utility boxes and red lanterns, with only a few pedestrians visible in the distance as the environment becomes increasingly claustrophobic and artificially lit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the cool shadows of an urban underpass into the brilliant, golden light of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway structure, moving past graffiti-covered walls and tram tracks amidst a flow of pedestrians. As the camera emerges from the shade, the environment opens into a sun-drenched intersection where the character navigates a dense crowd and waits for a black sedan to pass. The scene then shifts onto a vibrant commercial street, gliding past towering glass facades and palm trees while massive digital billboards illuminate the surroundings. Finally, the movement continues along the crowded sidewalk as futuristic vehicles stream by under the warm, glowing light of the golden hour.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a semi-shaded urban thoroughfare into a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway. It begins by gliding under building overhangs where natural golden hour light blends with artificial glows, passing a prominent pink billboard and crowds of pedestrians near storefronts. As the camera turns away from the flowing traffic, the open street gives way to a narrow enclosed passage. The environment then shifts into a moody atmosphere dominated by green neon lighting and rising steam, flanked by high concrete walls and red lanterns. Finally, the scene closes in as the space becomes increasingly tight, leaving only a few distant figures visible in the artificial gloom.
